name: Cashew Chicken Pxsm22a
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients for the sauce well and set aside.
2. Heat a little oil in a wok or frying pan. Add minced garlic and cook until fragrant.
3. Add the cubed chicken to the wok and cook until no longer pink.
4. Add the green peppers and cook for a minute or two.
5. Sprinkle some rice wine vinegar over the chicken/vegetable mixture and cook another minute.
6. Add cashews and cook for another minute.
7. Pour the sauce over the contents of the wok and stir to combine.
8. Cook until heated through, stirring occasionally.
9. Serve hot over cooked rice with a side dish like Szechuan Green Beans.
(Note: This recipe is attributed to Dan Gruber, as indicated in the original text.)
